explanation: The conversation focuses on the large amount of garbage and metal debris orbiting the Earth in space.
The woman says, “I saw a television program about it last night,” which directly states where she learned about the problem.
The woman explains that according to the television program, there are about 3,000 tons of metal in orbit around the Earth.

a: Scientists will stop all space missions
c: Scientists will find solutions to the problem
d: Nuclear reactors will no longer be used in space
explanation: At the end of the conversation, the woman says she hopes scientists will be able to find solutions before the problem becomes worse.
